response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio content matches the Reference JSON's summary of a conversational skit between two VTubers without vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON helped confirm character names (Cecilia and Gigi) and the structure of the skit. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely synchronized to the spoken dialogue, including overlapping lines and the high-energy screaming transition. Japanese interjections such as 'Atsui' (Hot) were transcribed in Japanese and translated to English.

subtitles.original: So cute! / So cute!
